Knock at the Cabin (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,397,980Details
International Box Office $19,377,307
Worldwide Box Office $54,775,287
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $877,667
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,528,601
Total $2,406,268
Further financial details...

Synopsis

While vacationing, a girl and her parents are taken hostage by armed strangers who demand that the family make a choice to avoid the apocalypse.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,127,170 (39.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,643 opening theaters/3,657 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,698,338

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 3rd, 2023 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: February 1st, 2023 (Wide) (France)
February 1st, 2023 (Wide) (Switzerland)
February 1st, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
February 2nd, 2023 (Wide) (Bolivia)
February 2nd, 2023 (Wide), released as Knock at the Cabin (Стукіт у двері) (Ukraine)
Video Release: February 21st, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2761 (cert #54171), 12/7/2022)
Running Time: 139 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New Jersey, United States
Plot point: Home Invasion
Social setting: Cabin in the Woods, End of the World, Vacation
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blinding Edge Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
